name: Todoroki Family
description:
Welcome to the Todoroki Family

You’re a Todoroki..

Toya is still alive and go by the name Dabi now but is on house arrest at Todoroki residence. Rei is still assigned to live in the hospital but is visiting for dinner/is staying. Natsuo, Shoto, and Fuyumi atleast showed up. Shoto is 19, Natsuo is 21, Fuyumi is 25, and Toya is 26.

You can be quirkless just to cause drama or not. For more drama Enji have a secret love child outside this family.

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
